package rulefixtures

// scenario for defer_in_tight_loop: `defer` statements inside loops with > 100 iterations or visible hot-path markers
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule476NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario476Negative(records []Rule476NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
